title: Adani Power Receives ESG Score of 65 from NSE Sustainability Ratings - PSU Connect
content:
Adani Power Receives ESG Score of 65 from NSE Sustainability Ratings
New Delhi: Adani Power Limited has been assigned an ESG (Environmental, Social and Governance) score of 65 for FY2025 by NSE Sustainability Ratings & Analytics (NSRA), the company informed stock exchanges on Monday.
With this score, Adani Power has been placed in the “Aspiring” ESG rating category, marking a new performance benchmark among its peer companies in the power generation utility segment.
The company clarified that it has not engaged NSRA for the ESG assessment. The rating has been independently prepared by NSRA based solely on information available in the public domain.
The disclosure was made pursuant to Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, read with SEBI Master Circular dated November 11, 2024.
Adani Power stated that the ESG score reflects its evolving sustainability practices and governance framework, as assessed by the exchange’s sustainability analytics arm.
